sections.paragraph:
fut. apoc. יִשְׁבְּ to take, or lead away captive (Arab. سبا, Syr. ܫܒܐܳ id.), whether persons, Gen 34:29 1Ki 8:48 Psa 137:3 or flocks, 1Ch 5:21 or else wealth, 2Ch 21:17.- Gen 31:26, שְׁבוּיֹות חֶרֶב “captives of the sword” (in Greek, αἰχμάλωται, δορυάλωται), i.e. taken in war; compare 2Ki 6:22.

Niphal, pass. of Kal, Gen 14:14 Exo 22:9.

Derivatives, שְׁבוּת, שְׁבִי, שִׁבְיָה, שׁבִית, and pr.n. שְׁבוּאֵל, שְׁבִי, שֹׁבַי, תִּשְׁבֶּה.
